programme.desc: Maurice is a streetwise ginger cat who comes up with a money-making scam by befriending a group of talking rats. However, when Maurice and the rodents reach the town of Bad Blintz, their little con soon goes down the drain.

programme.title: My Penguin Friend
programme.desc: A heartbroken fisherman finds a penguin drifting alone in the ocean, drenched in oil from a spill. He not only rescues the sea creature, but takes it under his wing, finding a sense of joy for the first time in years.

programme.title: Transplant
programme.desc: Bash's decisions lead to conflict with the new chief of emergency medicine; Mags struggles to save a patient who thinks the system gave up on her; June has trouble with her new roommate, and gets a work proposal from Novak; Theo has trouble adapting.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Spencer
programme.desc: The marriage between Princess Diana and Prince Charles has long since grown cold. Diana knows the game, but this year, things will be profoundly different.

programme.title: Love Island

To avenge their lost ice time, an impulsive hockey player and a ruthless octogenarian-a former derby champion-have a plan: recruit the town's outcasts and create an underground roller derby team.
